name: Marvelous Macaroons
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Dole pineapple in can, juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple well and reserve the juice for beverage.
2. Combine the drained pineapple, sweetened condensed milk, coconut, toasted almonds, margarine, 1 teaspoon of lemon peel, and almond extract in a large bowl; mix well.
3. In a small bowl, combine the flour and baking powder.
4. Beat the flour mixture into the pineapple mixture until blended.
5. Drop by heaping tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 13-15 minutes.
7. Cool on wire racks.
8. Store in the refrigerator.
Makes 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
